violations.description: No cross-stack-reference strength configured, defaulting to "strong". We recommend you set feature flag "@aws-cdk/core:defaultCrossStackReferences" to "both", then deploy everywhere, then set it to "weak". Alternatively, set it to "strong" explicitly to lock in the current producer-protecting behavior. (See: https://github.com/aws/aws-cdk/blob/main/packages/aws-cdk-lib/README.md#reference-strength) [ack: @aws-cdk/core:crossStackReferencesDefaultStrong]
